      "source": [
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "url = \"https://archive.ics.uci.edu/ml/machine-learning-databases/arrhythmia/arrhythmia.data\"\n",
        "\n",
        "df = pd.read_csv(url, header=None)\n",
        "\n",
        "X = df.iloc[:, :-1]\n",
        "y = df.iloc[:, -1]\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"شكل البيانات:\", X.shape)\n",
        "print(\"الفئات:\\n\", y.value_counts())"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": null,
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "fRMLyWhnW8Xt",
        "outputId": "052fa302-47b1-4b0b-f655-baa797d6f2c3"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "name": "stdout",
          "output_type": "stream",
          "text": [
            "القيم المفقودة المتبقية: 0\n",
            "عدد الفئات: 13\n",
            "شكل X بعد التنظيف: (452, 279)\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "# تحويل كل شيء لأرقام أولاً\n",
        "X = X.apply(pd.to_numeric, errors='coerce')\n",
        "\n",
        "# الآن نملأ القيم المفقودة بالوسيط\n",
        "X = X.fillna(X.median())\n",
        "\n",
        "from sklearn.preprocessing import LabelEncoder\n",
        "le = LabelEncoder()\n",
        "y_enc = le.fit_transform(y.values.ravel())\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"القيم المفقودة المتبقية:\", X.isnull().sum().sum())\n",
        "print(\"عدد الفئات:\", len(le.classes_))\n",
        "print(\"شكل X بعد التنظيف:\", X.shape)"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": null,
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "xjbD4-w5Y2J5",
        "outputId": "c085e44e-624c-4a33-fda8-2ff8c7271ef9"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "name": "stdout",
          "output_type": "stream",
          "text": [
            "عدد العينات بعد التصفية: 438\n",
            "الأبعاد بعد PCA: 66\n",
            "الدقة: 68.18 %\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split\n",
        "from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler\n",
        "from sklearn.decomposition import PCA\n",
        "from sklearn.svm import SVC\n",
        "from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score\n",
        "from imblearn.over_sampling import SMOTE\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "# حذف الفئات التي عندها أقل من 6 عينات\n",
        "from collections import Counter\n",
        "counts = Counter(y_enc)\n",
        "valid_classes = [cls for cls, cnt in counts.items() if cnt >= 6]\n",
        "mask = np.isin(y_enc, valid_classes)\n",
        "X_filtered = X[mask]\n",
        "y_filtered = y_enc[mask]\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"عدد العينات بعد التصفية:\", X_filtered.shape[0])\n",
        "\n",
        "X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(\n",
        "    X_filtered, y_filtered, test_size=0.2, random_state=42)\n",
        "\n",
        "scaler = StandardScaler()\n",
        "X_train = scaler.fit_transform(X_train)\n",
        "X_test = scaler.transform(X_test)\n",
        "\n",
        "sm = SMOTE(random_state=42, k_neighbors=3)\n",
        "X_train, y_train = sm.fit_resample(X_train, y_train)\n",
        "\n",
        "pca = PCA(n_components=0.95)\n",
        "X_train = pca.fit_transform(X_train)\n",
        "X_test = pca.transform(X_test)\n",
        "print(\"الأبعاد بعد PCA:\", X_train.shape[1])\n",
        "\n",
        "model = SVC(kernel='rbf', C=10, gamma='scale', random_state=42)\n",
        "model.fit(X_train, y_train)\n",
        "\n",
        "y_pred = model.predict(X_test)\n",
        "print(\"الدقة:\", round(accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred)*100, 2), \"%\")"
      ]
    },
    {

      ],
      "source": [
        "from sklearn.metrics import classification_report, confusion_matrix\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import seaborn as sns\n",
        "\n",
        "cm = confusion_matrix(y_test, y_pred)\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10,8))\n",
        "sns.heatmap(cm, annot=True, fmt='d', cmap='Blues')\n",
        "plt.title('Confusion Matrix - Arrhythmia Classification')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('القيم الحقيقية')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('القيم المتنبأة')\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "print(classification_report(y_test, y_pred))"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": null,
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "KMHMLW_Ma8Ng",
        "outputId": "59224036-c974-46d6-f4b4-098e638bce3d"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "name": "stdout",
          "output_type": "stream",
          "text": [
            "Random Forest: 69.32 %\n",
            "Gradient Boosting: 67.05 %\n",
            "Voting: 72.73 %\n",
            "الأفضل: Voting بدقة 72.73 %\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestClassifier\n",
        "from sklearn.ensemble import VotingClassifier\n",
        "from sklearn.ensemble import GradientBoostingClassifier\n",
        "from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score\n",
        "\n",
        "rf = RandomForestClassifier(\n",
        "n_estimators=200,\n",
        "max_depth=None,\n",
        "random_state=42,\n",
        "n_jobs=-1\n",
        ")\n",
        "rf.fit(X_train, y_train)\n",
        "rf_pred = rf.predict(X_test)\n",
        "rf_acc = round(accuracy_score(y_test, rf_pred)*100, 2)\n",
        "print(\"Random Forest:\", rf_acc, \"%\")\n",
        "\n",
        "gb = GradientBoostingClassifier(\n",
        "n_estimators=150,\n",
        "learning_rate=0.1,\n",
        "max_depth=4,\n",
        "random_state=42\n",
        ")\n",
        "gb.fit(X_train, y_train)\n",
        "gb_pred = gb.predict(X_test)\n",
        "gb_acc = round(accuracy_score(y_test, gb_pred)*100, 2)\n",
        "print(\"Gradient Boosting:\", gb_acc, \"%\")\n",
        "\n",
        "voting = VotingClassifier(\n",
        "estimators=[('svm', model), ('rf', rf), ('gb', gb)],\n",
        "voting='hard'\n",
        ")\n",
        "voting.fit(X_train, y_train)\n",
        "v_pred = voting.predict(X_test)\n",
        "v_acc = round(accuracy_score(y_test, v_pred)*100, 2)\n",
        "print(\"Voting:\", v_acc, \"%\")\n",
        "\n",
        "results = [(\"SVM\", 68.18), (\"Random Forest\", rf_acc), (\"Gradient Boosting\", gb_acc), (\"Voting\", v_acc)]\n",
        "best = max(results, key=lambda x: x[1])\n",
        "print(\"الأفضل:\", best[0], \"بدقة\", best[1], \"%\")"
      ]
    },

      "cell_type": "code",

            "أفضل معاملات: {'n_estimators': 300, 'min_samples_split': 2, 'min_samples_leaf': 1, 'max_depth': 20}\n",

          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "from sklearn.model_selection import RandomizedSearchCV\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "params = {\n",
        "'n_estimators': [200, 300, 500],\n",
        "'max_depth': [10, 20, None],\n",
        "'min_samples_split': [2, 5, 10],\n",
        "'min_samples_leaf': [1, 2, 4]\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "search = RandomizedSearchCV(\n",
        "RandomForestClassifier(random_state=42, n_jobs=-1),\n",
        "params,\n",
        "n_iter=20,\n",
        "cv=3,\n",
        "scoring='accuracy',\n",
        "random_state=42,\n",
        "n_jobs=-1\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "search.fit(X_train, y_train)\n",
        "best_rf = search.best_estimator_\n",
        "best_pred = best_rf.predict(X_test)\n",
        "best_acc = round(accuracy_score(y_test, best_pred)*100, 2)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"أفضل معاملات:\", search.best_params_)\n",
        "print(\"الدقة بعد الضبط:\", best_acc, \"%\")"
      ]
    },

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split\n",
        "from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler\n",
        "from sklearn.decomposition import PCA\n",
        "from sklearn.svm import SVC\n",
        "from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score\n",
        "\n",
        "X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(\n",
        "X, y_enc, test_size=0.2, random_state=42, stratify=y_enc)\n",
        "\n",
        "scaler = StandardScaler()\n",
        "X_train = scaler.fit_transform(X_train)\n",
        "X_test = scaler.transform(X_test)\n",
        "\n",
        "pca = PCA(n_components=0.95)\n",
        "X_train = pca.fit_transform(X_train)\n",
        "X_test = pca.transform(X_test)\n",
        "print(\"الأبعاد بعد PCA:\", X_train.shape[1])\n",
        "\n",
        "model = SVC(\n",
        "kernel='rbf',\n",
        "C=10,\n",
        "gamma='scale',\n",
        "class_weight='balanced',\n",
        "random_state=42\n",
        ")\n",
        "model.fit(X_train, y_train)\n",
        "y_pred = model.predict(X_test)\n",
        "print(\"الدقة:\", round(accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred)*100, 2), \"%\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "3ycs263tlzRi",
        "outputId": "9589de24-2c10-4015-fc9d-ec4883a63858"
      },
      "execution_count": 29,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "الأبعاد بعد PCA: 94\n",
            "الدقة: 68.13 %\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },

    {

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split\n",
        "from sklearn.model_selection import cross_val_score\n",
        "from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler\n",
        "from sklearn.decomposition import PCA\n",
        "from sklearn.svm import SVC\n",
        "from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score\n",
        "\n",
        "X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(\n",
        "X, y_enc, test_size=0.2, random_state=42, stratify=y_enc)\n",
        "\n",
        "scaler = StandardScaler()\n",
        "X_train = scaler.fit_transform(X_train)\n",
        "X_test = scaler.transform(X_test)\n",
        "\n",
        "pca = PCA(n_components=0.95)\n",
        "X_train = pca.fit_transform(X_train)\n",
        "X_test = pca.transform(X_test)\n",
        "\n",
        "best_acc = 0\n",
        "best_c = 0\n",
        "best_g = 0\n",
        "\n",
        "for C in [1, 10, 50, 100]:\n",
        "    for gamma in [0.001, 0.01, 0.1, 'scale']:\n",
        "        m = SVC(kernel='rbf', C=C, gamma=gamma, class_weight='balanced')\n",
        "        m.fit(X_train, y_train)\n",
        "        acc = round(accuracy_score(y_test, m.predict(X_test))*100, 2)\n",
        "        print(\"C:\", C, \"gamma:\", gamma, \"دقة:\", acc, \"%\")\n",
        "        if acc > best_acc:\n",
        "            best_acc = acc\n",
        "            best_c = C\n",
        "            best_g = gamma\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"الأفضل: C=\", best_c, \"gamma=\", best_g, \"دقة:\", best_acc, \"%\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "TzBomNFsmFLh",
        "outputId": "0e1ae5f1-ca4a-47eb-8cc8-3ddf157a4f5c"
      },
      "execution_count": 31,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "C: 1 gamma: 0.001 دقة: 62.64 %\n",
            "C: 1 gamma: 0.01 دقة: 51.65 %\n",
            "C: 1 gamma: 0.1 دقة: 53.85 %\n",
            "C: 1 gamma: scale دقة: 54.95 %\n",
            "C: 10 gamma: 0.001 دقة: 61.54 %\n",
            "C: 10 gamma: 0.01 دقة: 59.34 %\n",
            "C: 10 gamma: 0.1 دقة: 53.85 %\n",
            "C: 10 gamma: scale دقة: 68.13 %\n",
            "C: 50 gamma: 0.001 دقة: 69.23 %\n",

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "from xgboost import XGBClassifier\n",
        "from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split\n",
        "from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler\n",
        "from sklearn.decomposition import PCA\n",
        "from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score\n",
        "\n",
        "X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(\n",
        "X, y_enc, test_size=0.2, random_state=42, stratify=y_enc)\n",
        "\n",
        "scaler = StandardScaler()\n",
        "X_train = scaler.fit_transform(X_train)\n",
        "X_test = scaler.transform(X_test)\n",
        "\n",
        "pca = PCA(n_components=0.95)\n",
        "X_train = pca.fit_transform(X_train)\n",
        "X_test = pca.transform(X_test)\n",
        "\n",
        "model = XGBClassifier(\n",
        "n_estimators=300,\n",
        "learning_rate=0.05,\n",
        "max_depth=6,\n",
        "random_state=42,\n",
        "eval_metric='mlogloss',\n",
        "use_label_encoder=False\n",
        ")\n",
        "model.fit(X_train, y_train)\n",
        "y_pred = model.predict(X_test)\n",
        "print(\"XGBoost دقة:\", round(accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred)*100, 2), \"%\")"
      ],
